name: Jethro Monroe / Clinical 16-bit v4.0
description: COMPLETE CLINICAL SEPARATION SYSTEM: All 5 surgical fixes working together to stretch phase space. (1) Membership Crowbar: 100:1 L:C ratio makes engine colorblind to fur noise. (2) Neutral Dead-Zone: C<20 forced to gray (exclusion zone around gray axis). (3) Deterministic Anchor: PeakFinder reserves blue slot. (4) Sector Exclusion: Blacklist green, prefer blue, prevent hallucinated plates. (5) Density Floor Override: Preserve all anchors. Result: Slot 1 hard-locked to blue, remaining slots forced to pure grayscale tonal ramps.
